title: Lay This Laurel On The One
content:
Lay this laurel on the one
    Too intrinsic for renown.
    Laurel! veil your deathless tree, --
    Him you chasten, that is he!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Emily Elizabeth Dickinson, titled "Lay This Laurel On The One", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
